<!-- fixture_expected: pass -->
<!-- fixture_purpose: source-backed in-window rows are allowed in classifier handoff -->

# Commission Signal Board Fixture: valid source-backed backtest

### 1. Commission Intake Receipt

```yaml
commission_id: fixture_valid_source_backed_backtest
mode: backtest
candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product B
decision_context: Exercise non-empty handoff after retrieval proves in-window evidence.
market_or_geography: US
time_window: 2018-2020
evidence_cutoff_at: 2020-12-31
input_status: complete
missing_required_inputs: []
cutoff_rule: only source observations observable on or before 2020-12-31 may enter downstream handoff
non_goals_preserved:
  - no demand classification
  - no graph construction
```

### 4. Signal Board Rows

| Row ID | Source family | Subfamily | Surface | Observable | Signal role | Row purpose | Recency status | Recency attention | Graph role | Graph weight hint | Evidence status | Provenance needed | Surface cutoff status | Cutoff status | Handoff note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SBR-001 | forums_community | Reddit | public thread | dated consumer question | consumer_language | signal_unit | recent | high | node_candidate | medium | source_backed | URL and thread date supplied | existed_by_cutoff | in_window | Eligible for classifier handoff |
| SBR-002 | reviews | retailer reviews | PDP reviews | dated complaint cluster | review_experience | contradiction | recent | high | counterevidence_path | medium | source_backed | review URL and review date supplied | existed_by_cutoff | in_window | Eligible counterevidence handoff |
| SBR-003 | aeo_answer_engines | answer engines | ChatGPT/Gemini/AIO | answer visibility | aeo_visibility | gap | not_applicable | low | none | none | excluded_future_info | not applicable | post_cutoff_surface | post_cutoff_excluded | Exclude from classifier handoff |

### 7. Graph Retrieval Brief

```yaml
graph_retrieval_brief:
  graph_weight_notes: relation utility only; graph weight is not signal strength
  backtest_cutoff_date: 2020-12-31
  future_info_exclusion_rule: exclude observations not observable on or before 2020-12-31
```

### 8. Demand-Classifier Handoff Packet

```yaml
classifier_handoff_packet:
  candidate_or_subject: Fixture Product B
  decision_context: Exercise non-empty handoff after retrieval proves in-window evidence.
  mode: backtest
  cutoff_date: 2020-12-31
  signal_rows_for_handoff:
    - SBR-001
  counterevidence_rows_for_handoff:
    - SBR-002
  source_family_gaps:
    - SBR-003 excluded as post_cutoff_surface / excluded_future_info.
  provenance_gaps: []
  cutoff_uncertainties: []
  classifier_mapping_status: classifier_owned
  prohibited_claims:
    - no demand verdict
    - no buyer-proof claim
    - no validation or readiness claim
    - no graph score
    - no forecast probability
```

### 10. Board Status And Run Boundary

```yaml
board_status: READY_FOR_RETRIEVAL_HANDOFF
run_boundary: CHAT_ONLY_BOARD_COMPLETE
next_authorized_step: Classifier use still requires separate classifier authority.
```
